write_policy: Do not overwrite canonical 01/assets/reference-frames/r001e01.png through r004e01.png in generation runs. Write candidates under director-room shot candidate folders, then promote only after human/director QC.

tasks.positive_prompt_zh: 墙外低机位正中对称史诗攻城建立，同一面锁喉关黑石外墙和同一城门，兽族攻城队列和破门器械从暴雪中沿同一轴线压近，墙顶 P017 肃明旗和守军枪线只是小剪影，昭明旧帝国金属警钟只作为门楼内部钟声不露出。
tasks.positive_prompt_en: Low centered exterior epic siege establishing frame, same Suohou Gate blackstone outer wall and same gate, beast troops and siege engine pressing along one axis through blizzard, P017 Suming flags and defender spear lines only as small silhouettes, the ancient Zhaoming old-empire metal alarm bell exists only as offscreen gatehouse sound.
tasks.negative_prompt_zh: 不要警钟特写、不要越墙、不要第二墙第二门、不要城内侧兽潮、不要错误旗帜、不要全灰黑雪雾。
tasks.negative_prompt_en: No alarm-bell close-up, no crossing the wall, no second wall or second gate, no beast attackers inside the wall, no wrong flags, no uniformly grey-black snow haze.

execution_attempt.reason: ComfyUI API is reachable, but checkpoint and ControlNet model lists are empty.

tasks.positive_prompt_zh: 同一墙外轴线更近靠近城门，攻城梁或铁包巨角第一次重撞同一木铁城门，冷白雪雾、碎冰、旧木屑、门闩震动成为最强亮部，墙顶仍是 P017 肃明旗。
tasks.positive_prompt_en: Same exterior axis closer to the gate, siege beam or iron-wrapped horn hits the same timber-iron gate for the first time, cold-white snow blast, ice splinters, old timber chips and shaking gate bars become the strongest highlight, wall-top flags remain P017 Suming flags.
tasks.negative_prompt_zh: 不要转向、不要穿墙、不要进入城内、不要第二个城门、不要撞击点离开城门。
tasks.negative_prompt_en: No turn, no wall pass-through, no entering the interior, no second gate, no impact point away from the gate.

execution_attempt.reason: ComfyUI API is reachable, but checkpoint and ControlNet model lists are empty.

tasks.positive_prompt_zh: 门楼内近中景，前景断矛斜滑入雪泥，中景 E01_C024A 年轻灰墙军户被撞门余震震倒但仍活着，半睁眼或眯眼、冷气喘息、手指张开撑雪泥、膝盖弯曲、靴底打滑，后景同一口昭明旧帝国五千年金属警钟挂在同一木架下横摆，钟链斜拉、木架抖雪，钟面只有继承 P016 的破损不可读昭明日月星盘残徽；门外只给暴雪、烟尘和杀声压力。
tasks.positive_prompt_en: Gatehouse interior tight-medium frame: foreground broken spear slides diagonally through snow mud, midground E01_C024A young grey-wall soldier is knocked down alive by the gate-impact aftershock, half-open or squinting eyes, visible cold breath, splayed hand bracing in snow mud, bent knee and slipping boot, background same five-thousand-year-old Zhaoming old-empire metal alarm bell swings under the same timber frame, chain pulled diagonally, timber snow shaking loose, only broken unreadable P016-derived Zhaoming sun-moon astrolabe emblem fragments on the bell; exterior remains only blizzard, smoke and battle pressure.
tasks.negative_prompt_zh: 不要死亡尸体感、不要大血泊、不要扶钟动作、不要换钟架、不要完整新徽章、不要骨质或象牙钟面、不要房屋街区窗灯城市塔楼、不要正脸英雄表情、不要城外开阔战场误读、不要第二墙。
tasks.negative_prompt_en: No dead-corpse read, no closed corpse eyes, no limp neck, no slack dead face, no blood pool, no bell-bracing action, no changed bell frame, no complete clean emblem, no P018 beast emblem on the bell, no ivory or bone bell surface, no houses, streets, warm windows or city towers, no heroic front-face expression, no reading as an open exterior battlefield, no second wall.

execution_attempt.notes: User approved the R003 space/action result, then requested style matching to R001/R002 because the previous image had too much particle noise, cheaper realism, and mismatched lighting. Current v006 style-matched image reduces digital grain and snow speck density, keeps low-key high-contrast R001/R002 lighting, preserves E01_C024A alive aftershock posture and the P016-derived old metal bell, and has been promoted to canonical 01/assets/reference-frames/r003e01.png. Previous v005 candidate was archived under the shot candidates/history folder before replacement.

tasks.positive_prompt_zh: 门楼后侧三分位中近景，薛临墙压住同一黑石女墙面对墙外，冻裂手、粗麻墙巾、旧甲片和半暗侧脸可读，背景保留同一昭明旧帝国五千年金属警钟横摆，钟面只有继承 P016 的破损不可读昭明日月星盘残徽；墙外斜下方只给暴雪、烟尘、C020/C021/E01_C020 多兵种兽族攻城阵线、伴生兽、破门猛犸/岩背犀/牛轭车和攻城器械压力，不出现房屋、城市街区或窗灯。
tasks.positive_prompt_en: Gatehouse-side rear-three-quarter medium close-up: Xue Linqiang presses the same blackstone parapet facing outward, cracked hand, coarse wall scarf, old armor plates and half-dark side profile readable, background keeps the same five-thousand-year-old Zhaoming old-empire metal alarm bell swinging, with only broken unreadable P016-derived Zhaoming sun-moon astrolabe emblem fragments on the bell; exterior below the parapet shows only blizzard, smoke, C020/C021/E01_C020 multi-branch beast siege formation, bonded companion beasts, gate-breaking mammoth, rockback rhino, oxen-yoked siege line and siege-equipment pressure, no houses, city streets or warm windows.
tasks.negative_prompt_zh: 不要英雄仰拍、不要干净战神、不要背景警钟消失、不要完整新徽章、不要骨质或象牙钟面、不要房屋街区窗灯城市塔楼、不要年轻军户站起、不要兽族挤进门楼内、不要墙前第二道墙或第二个城门。
tasks.negative_prompt_en: No heroic low-angle pose, no clean war-god styling, no disappearing background alarm bell, no complete clean emblem, no P018 beast emblem on the bell, no ivory or bone bell surface, no houses, streets, warm windows or city towers, no young soldier standing up, no beast attackers inside the gatehouse, no human army outside, no generic single-species orc horde, no ownerless monster pack, no second wall in front of the gate, no second gate.

execution_attempt.notes: User approved the R004 space/action result, then requested style matching to R001/R002 because the previous image had too much particle noise, cheaper realism, and mismatched lighting. Current v005 style-matched image reduces digital grain and snow speck density, uses the R001/R002 cold storm-break sky and blackstone negative-fill lighting, preserves Xue, the same parapet, C020/C021/E01_C020 exterior beast siege pressure and the P016-derived old metal bell, and has been promoted to canonical 01/assets/reference-frames/r004e01.png. Previous v004 candidate was archived under the shot candidates/history folder before replacement.
